articles.title: France’s 10-Year OAT Yield at Over Three-Week High
articles.expand: France’s 10-year OAT yield rose back above 3.4%, its highest level since February 9, as investors refocused on inflation risks against the backdrop of a rapidly worsening Middle East conflict. Tensions escalated sharply following reports that a US submarine sank an Iranian warship near Sri Lanka and that NATO air defenses intercepted an Iranian bal...
articles.ai_headline: Rendimiento del OAT francés a 10 años supera 3.4%: riesgos inflacionarios y tensión en Medio Oriente intensifican presión vendedora sobre la zona euro → EUR bajista

articles.title: Italy’s 10-Year BTP Yield Climbs to One-Month High
articles.expand: Italy’s 10-year BTP yield climbed toward 3.5%, its highest level since February 3, as investors refocused on inflation risks amid an escalating conflict in the Middle East. The crisis has intensified, with reports that a US submarine sank an Iranian warship near Sri Lanka and that NATO air defenses intercepted an Iranian ballistic missile fired tow...
articles.ai_headline: Rendimiento de los BTP italianos a 10 años sube a máximo de un mes cerca de 3.5%: riesgos inflacionarios y tensión en Medio Oriente intensifican presión vendedora sobre la zona euro → EUR bajista

articles.title: German Bund Yields Hit Three-Week High on Inflation Risks
articles.expand: Germany’s 10-year Bund yield rose to 2.8%, its highest level since February 11, as investors refocused on inflation risks amid the escalating conflict in the Middle East, now in its sixth day. The confrontation has widened markedly, with reports that a US submarine sank an Iranian warship near Sri Lanka and that NATO air defenses intercepted an Ira...
articles.ai_headline: Rendimiento del Bund alemán a 10 años sube a 2.8%, máximo en tres semanas, por riesgos de inflación y conflicto en Medio Oriente → EUR bajista

articles.title: UK Gilt Yields Climb Amid Inflation Concerns
articles.expand: The yield on the UK 10-year gilt rose back to around 4.4%, its highest level since 12 February, as investor focus shifted again to inflation risks amid the escalating conflict in the Middle East, now in its sixth day. The resulting jump in oil and gas prices has intensified global inflation concerns, leading investors to rein in expectations for Ba...
articles.ai_headline: Rendimiento de la deuda del Reino Unido a 10 años sube a 4.4%: preocupaciones por la inflación intensificadas por el conflicto en Medio Oriente → GBP alcista

articles.title: India 10Y Yield at 1-Month Low
articles.expand: The yield on India’s 10-year G-Sec slipped to around 6.64%, retreating from earlier gains to hit its lowest level in more than a month as investors reversed prior selling. Heightened geopolitical tensions, following a US strike that sank an Iranian warship in South Asian waters, sparked a flight to safety and bolstered demand for government securit...
articles.ai_headline: Rendimiento de la deuda india a 10 años cae a 6.64%: inversores buscan refugio en activos seguros debido a tensiones geopolíticas → NZD bajista

articles.title: EU Natural Gas Prices Bounce Back
articles.expand: European natural gas futures climbed above €52/MWh on Thursday, approaching a three-year high after Russian President Vladimir Putin threatened to cut off gas supplies to Europe. Russian gas deliveries to the continent have already dropped sharply in recent years, and additional declines are expected from April 2026 through the end of 2027 as the E...
articles.ai_headline: Precios del gas natural europeo suben por encima de €52/MWh: amenaza de Putin de cortar suministros a Europa aumenta presión sobre la zona euro → USD alcista

articles.title: US futures bounce back up again, dollar pares gains on the day too
articles.expand: The volatile trading continues on the week and it's tough to hold any intraday convictions. S P 500 futures were down by as much as 0.5% earlier on but have now climbed back up to pare losses to be up 0.1% on the day. The only plausible headline I'm seeing that ties closely is one reported by Sky News Arabia, in citing Iran's foreign ministry as to...
articles.ai_headline: Futuros S&P 500 suben 0.1% después de caer 0.5%: volatilidad intradiaria afecta la cotización del dólar → USD neutral

articles.title: ECB's de Guindos: Baseline scenario is that US-Iran will be a short conflict
articles.expand: We have to use different scenarios after Iran attacks Baseline scenario is that it will be a short conflict Other scenario is that it will be more protracted Market reaction has been orderly ECB should change its policy stance if inflation expectations change as a result of the Iran war To look out for any steady modification of inflation and infla...
articles.ai_headline: Conflicto entre EEUU e Irán podría ser breve según el BCE: escenario de conflicto corto y reacción de mercado ordenada → EUR neutral

articles.title: Eurozone: Gas shock challenges ECB path – BNY
articles.expand: BNY strategist Geoff Yu argues that the sharp repricing of European natural gas futures has significantly overshot assumptions embedded in recent ECB staff projections.
articles.ai_headline: Repercusión del shock de gas en la zona euro cuestiona el camino del BCE: precios de futuros de gas natural europeos se han revaluado bruscamente → EUR bajista

articles.title: Japanese Yen turns upside down against US Dollar as dovish Fed bets recede
articles.expand: The Japanese Yen (JPY) gives back its early gains and turns negative against the US Dollar (USD) during the European trading session on Thursday. The USD/JPY pair rises to near 157.35 as the US Dollar resumes its upside journey after a corrective move.
articles.ai_headline: USD/JPY sube a 157.35: apreciación del dólar estadounidense tras corrección → JPY bajista

articles.title: Fed: Las probabilidades de recorte de tasas disminuyen tras datos sólidos – Deutsche Bank
articles.expand: Los estrategas de Deutsche Bank destacan que los mercados están descontando un alivio anticipado de la Reserva Federal tras los sólidos datos del ISM de servicios y de las nóminas privadas del ADP.
articles.ai_headline: Datos sólidos del ISM de servicios y nóminas privadas del ADP: disminuyen probabilidades de recorte de tasas de la Fed → USD alcista

articles.title: Fed: Rate cut odds repriced with strong data – Deutsche Bank

articles.ai_headline: ISM Services y ADP privados muestran datos sólidos: mercados reajustan probabilidades de recorte de tasas de la Fed → USD alcista

articles.title: Germany February construction PMI 43.7 vs 44.7 prior
articles.expand: Prior 44.7 This marks back-to-back decreases in German construction activity to start the new year, following a brief return to growth at the end of 2025. The civil engineering sub-sector recorded growth but that is in contrast to the sharp declines in work in both the housing and commercial segments. On the price front, average prices paid for pur...
articles.ai_headline: PMI de construcción alemán en febrero cae a 43.7 vs 44.7 previo: debilidad en sector inmobiliario europeo refuerza expectativa de menor crecimiento global → USD alcista

articles.title: USDJPY retains the bullish bias as traders pare back Fed rate cut bets; BoJ lacks support
articles.expand: FUNDAMENTAL OVERVIEW USD: The US dollar strengthened across the board on safe haven demand this week after the US-Iran conflict erupted over the weekend. The main driver though was the market’s realisation that rate cuts might not come as soon as expected. In fact, higher oil prices will eventually put upward pressure on inflation and the US data t...
articles.ai_headline: USD se fortalece por demanda de refugio y revisión de expectativas de recortes de tasas de la Fed: presión bajista sobre el yen → JPY bajista

articles.title: USD/CAD Previsión del Precio: El par se mantiene por encima de la EMA de 20 días en medio de la guerra entre EE.UU. e Irán
articles.expand: El par USD/CAD cotiza plano alrededor de 1.3645 durante la sesión de trading europea del jueves. El par Loonie se consolida a medida que el movimiento de recuperación del Dólar estadounidense (USD) tras una ligera corrección ha compensado la fortaleza del Dólar canadiense.
articles.ai_headline: USD/CAD se mantiene por encima de la EMA de 20 días en 1.3645: fortaleza del USD compensa la del CAD → CAD bajista

articles.title: USD/CAD Price Forecast: Hand holds 20-day EMA amid US-Iran war
articles.expand: The USD/CAD pair trades flat at around 1.3645 during the European trading session on Thursday. The Loonie pair consolidates as the recovery move in the US Dollar (USD) after a slight correction has offset the strength in the Canadian Dollar.
articles.ai_headline: USD/CAD se mantiene plano en 1.3645: recuperación del USD compensa fortaleza del CAD → CAD neutral

articles.title: Forex Hoy: Petróleo Crudo WTI a 78$ Mientras el Tráfico en Ormuz Permanece Detenido - 05 marzo 2026
articles.expand: El petróleo vuelve a subir mientras el Estrecho de Ormuz enfrenta interrupciones. Acciones, divisas y cripto reaccionan al nuevo foco geopolítico y energético.
articles.ai_headline: Petróleo WTI sube a 78$ por interrupciones en el Estrecho de Ormuz: tensión geopolítica impulsa refugio en el dólar → USD alcista

articles.title: What are the main events for today?
articles.expand: EUROPEAN SESSION In the European session, we don't have much on the agenda other than a couple of low tier releases like the construction PMIs and Eurozone retail sales. None of the data is going to change anything for the respective central banks or the market as the focus remains on the US-Iran war and increasing energy prices. AMERICAN SESSION I...

articles.title: CHF: El repunte del petróleo encuentra resistencia del SNB – Commerzbank
articles.expand: Michael Pfister de Commerzbank señala que el aumento de los precios del petróleo y un Franco suizo más fuerte se están compensando mutuamente en la inflación, dejando las presiones sobre los precios en Suiza moderadas.
articles.ai_headline: Aumento del petróleo compensado por apreciación del franco suizo: inflación moderada en Suiza con SNB vigilante → CHF mixto

articles.title: El USD/CHF se mantiene fuerte cerca de 0.7800 ante la disminución de las probabilidades de recorte de tasas de la Fed
articles.expand: El USD/CHF recupera sus pérdidas recientes de la sesión anterior, cotizando alrededor de 0.7800 durante las horas asiáticas del jueves. El par se aprecia a medida que el Dólar estadounidense (USD) gana terreno, ya que el conflicto en Irán ha entrado en su sexto día
articles.ai_headline: USD/CHF se mantiene fuerte cerca de 0.7800: conflicto en Irán y disminución de probabilidades de recorte de tasas de la Fed → CHF bajista

articles.title: USD/CHF remains stronger near 0.7800 on fading Fed rate cut odds
articles.expand: USD/CHF pares its recent losses from the previous session, trading around 0.7800 during the Asian hours on Thursday. The pair appreciates as the US Dollar (USD) gains ground, as the Iran conflict has entered its sixth day.
articles.ai_headline: USD/CHF se mantiene fuerte cerca de 0.7800: disminuyen probabilidades de recorte de tasas de la Fed y conflicto en Irán → CHF bajista

articles.title: Pound Sterling underperforms as UK faces stagflation risks amid Middle East war
articles.expand: The Pound Sterling trades lower against its major currency peers, is down 0.22% around 1.3340 against the US Dollar (USD), during the Asian trade on Thursday.

articles.expand: The GBP/USD currency pair continues to maintain a downward trend on the 4-hour timeframe, and on Wednesday, it made a slight correction against the recent collapse. articles.title: Nikkei futures are up 3.8%
articles.expand: We are going to get a bounce in Asian stock markets today but the question is: How high. Nikkei futures are trading at 56,310 versus the close yesterday of 54,245 in the cash market. That's a healthy 3.8% rally following a 3.6% decline yesterday. I should warn that cash prices don't always follow futures and with volatility this high, there will be...

articles.title: Australian trade balance highlights a light Asia-Pacific calendar. Eyes on Korea
articles.expand: The Asia-Pacific economic calendar has only one highlight today and that's the Australian January trade balance in goods report. The consensus is a surplus of A$3.9 billion, in a solid improvement from +$3.337 billion in December. Yesterday's price action in AUD was strange as it was a laggard despite the stronger GDP number. I tend to think the dr...
articles.ai_headline: Balance comercial australiano de enero espera superávit de A$3.9 mil millones: mejora desde A$3.337 mil millones en diciembre → AUD alcista

articles.title: Watchlist Update: AUD/CHF Pullback Setup Emerges
articles.expand: Australia’s strong GDP masked consumer weakness. With Middle East tensions driving severe risk-off sentiment globally, AUD/CHF presents a tactical pullback opportunity for short-term traders at key resistance.
articles.ai_headline: Tensiones en Medio Oriente intensifican sentimiento de riesgo: oportunidad de retroceso en AUD/CHF en resistencia clave → AUD bajista

articles.title: Australian Dollar Price Forecast: Next on the upside comes 0.7100
articles.expand: Sticky domestic inflation and a Reserve Bank of Australia (RBA) that is in no rush to soften its hawkish stance continue to provide an underlying cushion for the Australian Dollar (AUD) for now, keeping the door open to further gains and limiting the downside.
articles.ai_headline: Inflación interna estable y RBA con postura hawkish: objetivo a corto plazo en 0.7100 → AUD alcista

articles.title: Swiss CPI rises 0.6% mom in February, annual inflation holds at 0.1%
articles.expand: Switzerland’s consumer prices rose more than expected in February, offering a modest sign of price pressure despite still subdued annual inflation. Data from the Federal Statistical Office showed CPI increased 0.6% mom, slightly above the expected 0.5% gain. Core CPI, which excludes fresh and seasonal products as well as energy and fuel, rose by 0....
articles.ai_headline: Inflación suiza sube 0.6% en febrero: presión moderada sobre precios → CHF alcista

articles.title: BOJ governor Ueda says wage increases much needed to get inflation to price target
articles.expand: Wages need to increase significantly for Japan to sustainably, stably achieve BOJ price target Mechanism in which wages, prices rise in tandem needs to become embedded in the economy What is most important in raising real wages is to increase labour productivity It is hard to directly influence real wages with monetary policy It is difficult to set...
articles.ai_headline: Gobernador del BOJ Ueda destaca necesidad de aumentos salariales significativos para alcanzar meta de inflación: política monetaria tiene limitaciones para influir directamente en salarios reales → JPY bajista

articles.title: Australia Q4 GDP beats with 0.8% qoq growth, reinforcing RBA demand concerns
articles.expand: Australia’s economy expanded faster than expected in the fourth quarter, reinforcing concerns that domestic demand may still be running hotter than the RBA would like. GDP grew 0.8% qoq, beating forecasts of 0.7% and accelerating from the previous quarter’s 0.5% pace. On an annual basis, growth came in at 2.6% yoy, also above expectations of [&#823...
articles.ai_headline: PIB de Australia sube 0.8% trimestral en Q4 superando expectativas: crecimiento anual de 2.6% refuerza preocupaciones del RBA sobre demanda interna → AUD alcista

articles.title: Oil back to $100? The Hormuz disruption holds the key
articles.expand: Oil’s market reaction has been immediate and sharp. The market is no longer pricing in a simple rise in tensions, but the de facto paralysis of the world’s most strategic energy corridor: the Strait of Hormuz.

While broad US Dollar strength provided an early lift, the pair has encountered a significant "ceiling" that remains unbroken. The Fundamental Context: Oil vs. Greenback The primary catalyst for the recent reversal is a 7.3% surge...
